name: Call-Of-Doodie
currentFocus: Execution-quality refinement remains the core track: signed trust claims, clearer submit feedback, stronger front-door guidance, deeper build-milestone language, and coaching follow-through are now the active in-repo quality program while human-only launch blockers stay external.
nextMilestone: Land the next refinement tranche after trust/build-guidance groundwork: combat readability, deeper App-domain extraction, richer telemetry follow-through, and mobile/runtime optimization without regressing the deployable build or protocol surfaces.
